summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Bariatric Istanbul landing page. All major functionality working correctly including lead capture form, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and interactive elements.

integration_issues.issue: Navigation links don't scroll smoothly to target sections - appears to be CSS smooth scroll behavior not working properly

passed_tests: All 8 main sections render correctly (Hero, About, Hospital, Surgeon, Procedures, Results, Testimonials, FAQ, Contact)
Lead capture form displays with all required fields (name, surname, email, phone, language dropdown)
Form validation works - HTML5 required field validation prevents empty submission
Language dropdown opens and allows selection of all 6 languages
All 3 WhatsApp buttons link correctly to https://wa.me/bariatric and open in new tabs
FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly for all items
Mobile menu toggle works - opens and closes properly on mobile viewport
Mobile responsiveness - form and all elements display correctly on mobile
Form submission attempts work - shows appropriate error message for external CRM endpoint
All procedure cards (4), testimonial cards (3), video testimonials (3), gallery items (4), and stats cards (4) render correctly
All critical page elements remain visible and functional throughout testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Navigation smooth scrolling to sections doesn't work properly. Consider adding JavaScript smooth scroll behavior or checking CSS scroll-behavior implementation.
